name: .understandignore
summary: Understand-Anything ignore rules that exclude build artifacts, IDE metadata, and generated analysis output from graph scanning.

name: Application.java
summary: CLI entry point that dispatches to the broker or producer based on the first argument and passes port/topic identifiers for the producer path.

name: Broker.java
summary: Central TCP broker that accepts client connections, routes typed messages, registers producers and consumers, and drives topic queues plus consumer-group delivery.

name: Constants.java
summary: Shared numeric limits and the default broker listen port used across clients and the in-memory queue.

name: CreateResult.java
summary: Generic record pairing a created or found value with a boolean flag indicating whether the broker newly allocated the resource.

name: Consumer.java
summary: TCP consumer client that listens locally, registers with the broker via a typed protocol message, and exchanges consume/ack traffic over buffered streams.

name: ConsumerGroup.java
summary: Per-topic consumer group state tracking group id, read offset, and active broker-facing socket connections for coordinated delivery.

name: NESTED_CLASS.md
summary: Learning note explaining Java nested and inner classes, with examples tied to the consumer connection holder inside ConsumerGroup.

name: WINDOWS_VS_LINUX_TCP_ISSUE.md
summary: Troubleshooting write-up on Windows vs Linux TCP timing when the producer registers before its ServerSocket is listening, including the fix to bind the server socket first.

name: Message.java
summary: Wire-level message envelope with type byte and payload, plus stream helpers to read and write length-prefixed frames on TCP connections.

name: MessageType.java
summary: Enumeration of broker protocol opcodes for echo, registration, consume, and acknowledgment exchanges between clients and the broker.

name: Producer.java
summary: TCP producer client that binds a local port, registers with the broker, and streams user-entered payloads as typed consume messages.

name: ConsumerRegisterRequest.java
summary: Binary registration payload encoding consumer listen port, topic id, and consumer group id for broker-side routing.

name: ProducerRegisterRequest.java
summary: Binary registration payload encoding producer listen port and topic id so the broker can open a reverse connection for ingest.

name: Queue.java
summary: Fixed-capacity ring buffer storing variable-length byte records with push, pop, peek-by-offset, and debug introspection for topic backlogs.

name: README.md
summary: Minimal project readme with javac/java commands to compile all sources and run the broker or producer via Application.

name: TCPClient.java
summary: Standalone TCP echo client demo that sends length-prefixed strings to a local server for low-level socket experimentation.

name: TCPServer.java
summary: Standalone TCP echo server demo that reads length-prefixed frames and echoes them back for basic networking practice.

name: Topic.java
summary: Topic aggregate holding a message queue instance and the list of consumer groups subscribed to that topic id.
